exploration.title: MCP Auth-Gated Registration & Progressive Disclosure
openQuestions: Q1: Patterns-only kit vs also building the gov-legal MCP host and drivers?
Q2: New dedicated gov-legal/USPTO MCP package (reusing the seam) vs extending NLP/M365?
Q3: Build patterns natively on effect/unstable/ai vs wrap a third-party MCP framework?
Q4: Where the shared kit lives — new @beep/mcp-kit driver package vs foundation vs inline?
Q5: Per-source auth model (gate none|soft|hard) + tool-vanish vs graceful-degrade on absent key?
Q6: api_key_required wire channel — success-with-error-JSON vs tools/call isError:true wrapper?
Q7: Where the write-tool wall is enforced + how a gated call is audited (Activity table vs UsageRecord.metadata)?
